customerDashboard.title: Dashboard
customerDashboard.description: Manage your bookings and vehicle requests in one place.

stats.tripsDescription: Live trips currently on the road

comingSoonCharts.sectionDescription: Charts and trends for your booking history will appear here.
comingSoonCharts.bookingsTrendDescription: Your booking volume over the last 30 days
comingSoonCharts.spendingTrendDescription: Trip costs and billing totals over time
comingSoonCharts.tripTypesDescription: Breakdown of your most requested vehicle classes

customerRequests.title: Request Ride
customerRequests.description: Tell us where to pick you up and where you are going. Our dispatch team will review and assign a vehicle.
customerRequests.formDescription: Complete each step to submit your ride request.
customerRequests.sectionBillingDescription: Choose one-time billing or bill under your active contract. The matching contract is applied automatically from your trip details.
customerRequests.billingOneTimeDescription: Standard trip billed at regular rates.
customerRequests.billingContractDescription: We will match your trip to the active contract for your region, vehicle type, and class within the contract term.
customerRequests.contractAutoMatchPending: No active contract covers these trip details.
customerRequests.contractMatched: This trip will be billed under {reference} · {title}.
customerRequests.contractTermStartsOnPickup: Billing starts on your scheduled pickup date after dispatch accepts this request.
customerRequests.contractTermStartsOnAcceptance: Billing starts on the date dispatch accepts this request.
customerRequests.sectionRouteDescription: Choose your pickup and drop-off points. Saved locations are shown first.
customerRequests.sectionTripDetailsDescription: Vehicle preferences, passengers, and pickup timing.
customerRequests.sectionNotesDescription: Share anything dispatch should know before assigning a vehicle.
customerRequests.regionFilterHint: Filter saved locations by region. Leave empty to see all available sites.
customerRequests.submitHint: Dispatch will review your request and assign a vehicle.
customerRequests.savedLocationHint: Choose from the saved locations configured for your region.
customerRequests.savedLocationSelectedHint: Saved location selected. Clear the dropdown or edit the address to set a custom point on the map.
customerRequests.backupLocationHint: Enter a custom address and pin the exact point on the map.
customerRequests.noPickupLocations: No saved pickup locations are available for the selected region.
customerRequests.noDropoffLocations: No saved drop-off locations are available for the selected region.
customerRequests.mapPickerHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the exact location.
customerRequests.mapEmpty: No point selected on the map yet
customerRequests.scheduledAtHint: Leave both empty if you need the ride as soon as possible.
customerRequests.notesPlaceholder: Flight number, contact at gate, luggage details…
customerRequests.noVehicleTypes: No vehicle types are available right now.
customerRequests.noVehicleClasses: No classes are available for the selected vehicle type.
customerRequests.noRegions: No regions are available right now.
customerRequests.submitDisabledNoPermission: You do not have permission to submit ride requests.
customerRequests.recentDescription: Your five most recent submissions. Open My Requests for the full history.
customerRequests.emptyDescription: Submit your first ride request using the form above.

errors.dropoffSameAsPickup: Drop-off must be different from the pickup location.
errors.pickupCoordinatesRequired: Select the pickup point on the map.
errors.dropoffCoordinatesRequired: Select the drop-off point on the map.
errors.passengerCountInvalid: Enter a valid passenger count between 1 and 50.
errors.passengerExceedsCapacity: Passenger count exceeds the selected vehicle capacity ({capacity}).
errors.vehicleClassRequiresType: Select a vehicle type before choosing a vehicle class.
errors.vehicleClassInvalid: Selected vehicle class is not available for this vehicle type.
errors.regionRequired: Region is required for contract billing.
errors.vehicleTypeRequiredForContract: Vehicle type is required for contract billing.
errors.vehicleClassRequiredForContract: Vehicle class is required for contract billing.
errors.scheduledAtPast: Pickup time must be in the future.
errors.scheduledAtIncomplete: Select both a pickup date and time, or leave both empty.
errors.contractRequired: No active contract covers your region and vehicle selections.
errors.contractAmbiguous: More than one contract matches these trip details. Contact support.
errors.contractScopeMismatch: The selected contract does not match your trip details.

stats.title: Total requests

customerRequestHistory.tableDescription: Filter by status or search by address. Pending requests can be edited until dispatch confirms them.

customerRequestHistory.editDescription: Update trip details while dispatch has not confirmed this request yet.
customerRequestHistory.detailDescription: Full summary of your submitted ride request.
customerRequestHistory.detailRejectionReasonHint: Provided by dispatch when this request was rejected.
customerRequestHistory.detailAssignmentSectionDescription: Vehicle and driver assigned to your trip.
customerRequestHistory.contractPendingHint: Awaiting dispatch approval. Contract billing starts once this request is confirmed.
customerRequestHistory.detailMapEmpty: No map coordinates available for this request.
customerRequestHistory.policyEdit: You can edit this request while it is still pending.
customerRequestHistory.policyCancel: You can cancel within 15 minutes of submitting while the request is pending.
customerRequestHistory.policyLocked: This request can no longer be changed from your account.
customerRequestHistory.notEditable: Only pending requests can be edited.
customerRequestHistory.notCancellable: Cancellation is only available for pending requests within 15 minutes of submission.

adminNotificationTemplates.title: Message templates
adminNotificationTemplates.description: Configure email and SMS templates across ride requests, registrations, compliance, and future notification areas.

placeholders.title: Message placeholders
placeholders.description: Insert these tokens in email subjects and message bodies. They are replaced with real data when a notification is sent.
placeholders.warning: Only use the placeholders listed above. Unknown tokens such as {customer_name} will not be replaced and will appear literally in the message. The system will reject saves that include unsupported placeholders.

userRegistrations.title: User registrations
userRegistrations.description: Messages sent when a customer registers and their account is approved or declined.

insurance.title: Insurance compliance
insurance.description: Alerts sent when vehicle insurance is approaching expiry or already expired.

inspection.title: Inspection compliance
inspection.description: Alerts sent when vehicle inspection is approaching expiry or already expired.

created.title: Request submitted
created.description: Sent when a customer submits a new ride request.

confirmed.title: Request approved
confirmed.description: Sent when an admin approves a ride request.

rejected.title: Request declined
rejected.description: Sent when an admin rejects a ride request.

assigned.title: Vehicle assigned
assigned.description: Sent when a vehicle and driver are assigned to a trip.

started.title: Trip started
started.description: Sent when the trip moves to in progress.

completed.title: Trip completed
completed.description: Sent when the trip is marked complete.

cancelled.title: Request cancelled
cancelled.description: Sent when a customer cancels a pending request.

submitted.title: Registration submitted
submitted.description: Sent when a customer completes the sign-up form.

approved.title: Registration approved
approved.description: Sent when an admin activates the customer account.

rejected.title: Registration declined
rejected.description: Sent when an admin rejects a pending registration.

due_soon.title: Insurance due soon
due_soon.description: Sent when a vehicle insurance policy is approaching its expiry date.

expired.title: Insurance expired
expired.description: Sent when a vehicle insurance policy has passed its expiry date.

due_soon.title: Inspection due soon
due_soon.description: Sent when a vehicle inspection certificate is approaching its expiry date.

expired.title: Inspection expired
expired.description: Sent when a vehicle inspection certificate has passed its expiry date.

generated.title: Invoice generated
generated.description: Sent when a contract invoice is automatically or manually issued.

due_soon.title: Payment due soon
due_soon.description: Sent when an issued invoice is approaching its due date.

overdue.title: Payment overdue

pricingModelHelp.time: Charge by trip duration using a base fare plus per minute rate.

form.perHourRateHelp: Hourly charter rate before minimum hours are applied.

form.freeWaitingMinutesHelp: Idle time at pickup or stops that is included at no extra charge.
form.waitingFeePerMinuteHelp: Charged for each minute of waiting after the free waiting period ends.
